=== RUN   TestConvertAddresses
=== RUN   TestConvertAddresses/EVM

=== RUN   TestConvertAddresses/Polkadot

=== RUN   TestConvertAddresses/Kusama
    e:/git/the-web3/S8Work/dapplink-wallet-api/chain/polkadot/wallet_test.go:237: Kusama ConvertAddresses test passed: CtyVd7B8Neq9KUiRDxW63RxdiWLyHM5RTXerUoqiqmwLUvd
--- PASS: TestConvertAddresses (0.00s)
    --- PASS: TestConvertAddresses/EVM (0.00s)
    --- PASS: TestConvertAddresses/Polkadot (0.00s)
    --- PASS: TestConvertAddresses/Kusama (0.00s)
PASS
ok      github.com/dapplink-labs/dapplink-wallet-api/chain/polkadot     0.216s

## 根据区块高度获取交易信息

- EVM方式

```
=== RUN   TestGetBlock
=== RUN   TestGetBlock/EVM

--- PASS: TestGetBlock (9.73s)

PASS
ok  	github.com/dapplink-labs/dapplink-wallet-api/chain/polkadot	9.956s

## 根据地址查询交易详情

- EVM方式

  <https://blockscout.polkadot.io/address/0xDA3792fF5D99fced3EA1e383339F0E4006E379ed?tab=txs>

  === RUN   TestGetTransactionByAddress
  === RUN   TestGetTransactionByAddress/EVM

## 获取账户余额

- EVM方式
  ```
  === RUN   TestGetAccountBalance
  === RUN   TestGetAccountBalance/EVM
      e:/git/the-web3/S8Work/dapplink-wallet-api/chain/polkadot/wallet_test.go:773: EVM账户余额: 52659609113200000000
  --- PASS: TestGetAccountBalance (1.18s)
      --- PASS: TestGetAccountBalance/EVM (1.15s)
  PASS
  ok  	github.com/dapplink-labs/dapplink-wallet-api/chain/polkadot	4.487s
  ```
- 浏览器截图<https://blockscout.polkadot.io/address/0xf3CF0a843a63fBf8b05d500cB86c602279925d43?tab=tokens>

  ![](data:image/png;base64,)
- substrate方式
  ```
  === RUN   TestGetAccountBalance
  === RUN   TestGetAccountBalance/Polkadot
   Symbol: DOT, 余额: 422832163293680193
   Symbol: DED, 余额: 7281594189814951548
  --- PASS: TestGetAccountBalance (33.53s)
      --- PASS: TestGetAccountBalance/Polkadot (33.52s)
  PASS
  ok  	github.com/dapplink-labs/dapplink-wallet-api/chain/polkadot	33.648s
